channel.title: SevenAtSevenSection1
channel.description: This is a randomly ordered feed of the most recent entries from SevenAtSevenSection1, skipping any feeds with errors.

item.title: A historic day for U.S. cross-country skiing, but Shiffin's Olympic struggles continue
item.description: American women continue to dominate alpine ski racing events in the Winter Olympics, and American men win their first medal in cross-country skiing in...

item.title: Malinowski concedes to Mejia in Democratic House special primary in New Jersey
item.description: With the race still too close to call, former congressman Tom Malinowski conceded to challenger Analilia Mejia in a Democratic primary to replace the ...

item.title: Snowboarder Chloe Kim is chasing an Olympic gold three-peat with a torn labrum
item.description: At 25, Chloe Kim could become the first halfpipe snowboarder to win three consecutive Olympic golds.

item.title: Top 5 takeaways from the House immigration oversight hearing
item.description: The hearing underscored how deeply divided Republicans and Democrats remain on top-level changes to immigration enforcement in the wake of the shootin...

item.title: Pakistan-Afghanistan border closures paralyze trade along a key route
item.description: Trucks have been stuck at the closed border since October. Both countries are facing economic losses with no end in sight. The Taliban also banned all...

item.title: FBI releases surveillance images of masked person on Nancy Guthrie’s porch
item.description: A masked person with a handgun holster was caught on camera outside Nancy Guthrie’s front door the night she disappeared.

item.title: Here’s how Rivian changed the rear door manual release on the R2
item.description: Rivian, along with other automakers, has been under pressure to make the manual door releases easier to access. The new R2 SUV does that — here's how.

item.title: Bank-Owned Homes Grew Rapidly at the End of 2025—Are We in a New Era of Distress?
item.description: When foreclosure activity reaches the REO stage, it represents the outcome of financial distress. The homeowner is no longer in the picture, the aucti...

item.title: 6 Ways I’ve Diversified My Passive Portfolio in Search of “Perfection”
item.description: Every time I’ve tried to get “clever” and pick “the next hot investment,” life crammed some humble pie down my throat. I don’t do that anymore. In my ...

item.title: Gov. Tim Walz says federal immigration crackdown in Minnesota could end within days
Boston Dynamics CEO Robert Playter steps down after 30 years at the company
item.description: Robert Playter announcd he is leaving Boston Dynamics after 30 years at the company in various roles, including six years as CEO.

item.title: Nearly half of xAI’s founding team has now left the company
item.description: Whatever the cause of the departures, the cumulative impact is alarming. There is a lot of work left to do at xAI, and an IPO will bring more scrutiny...

item.title: Google sent personal and financial information of student journalist to ICE
item.description: The tech giant handed over the personal information of a journalist and student who attended a pro-Palestinian protest in 2024. This is the latest exa...

item.title: FBI search of Georgia offices tied to probe of possible 2020 election ‘defects,’ affidavit says
2026’s Top Growing Cities (People Are Moving Here!)
item.description: The “lock-in effect” is finally starting to break, and Americans are moving yet again. But, where are they going? The top cities people are moving to ...

item.title: VC Masha Bucher, Epstein associate and Day One founder, explains herself
item.description: After numerous news reports documented Masha Bucher's close business and personal relationship with convicted sex offender Jeffrey Epstein, Bucher too...

item.title: The W2 Employee’s Roadmap to Financial Freedom (Buy Rentals While Working 8-6)
item.description: Think you’re too busy to own rental properties? Real estate investing doesn’t have to dominate your time or energy. Today’s guest is living proof, hav...

item.title: The Small Sacrifices That Gave Me 25 Rentals and $18,000/Month Cash Flow
item.description: One property can change your entire life. Less than a decade after buying your first, you could be completely financially free, like today’s guest, wh...
